column3:
This game includes descriptions of cruelty and sexual language.
Please play at your own discretion and rest as necessary.

The rain was cold that night.
I didn't see anyone on the street.

The moon was bright that night.
The streetlamps' shadows flickered in the puddles...

Thank you for playing the demo! You can enjoy the rest
of the story in the full game planned to release in 2024.
Add the game to your wishlist so you'll know when it's out!

Share your thoughts about the demo with #saekogame
if you like. It'll be great motivation for the dev!
